# KZ Audio & Video

> Custom home theater, whole-house audio, outdoor AV, surround sound, and security camera installation in San Antonio TX and the Texas Hill Country. In the audio business since 1997. No subcontractors — ever.

KZ Audio & Video is a home AV installation company based in San Antonio, Texas. Founded by Kelly Zauber, who started in audio in 1997 and began doing residential home AV in 2001. Every installation is performed by Kelly, Billy, or Julian — the same three-person team. KZ Audio & Video never uses subcontractors.

## Services

- **Home Theater Installation**: Dedicated theater rooms and media spaces built around the specific room, projector, and client. Full service from pre-wire through system programming and client walkthrough.
- **Whole-House Audio**: Multi-room audio systems (Sonos and others) controlled from a phone or tablet. Designed around how the client actually uses their home.
- **Outdoor Audio & Video**: Weather-resistant speaker systems, outdoor projectors, and displays for covered patios, pool decks, and outdoor kitchens.
- **Surround Sound Installation**: 5.1, 7.1, and Dolby Atmos systems properly placed and calibrated — not just plugged in and set to default.
- **Security Camera Installation**: Indoor and outdoor camera systems integrated into the home technology setup with remote access.
- **TV Mounting & Installation**: Flat panel and Frame TV installation with zero visible wiring. Samsung Frame TV specialists.
- **AV Repair**: Repair and troubleshooting of existing AV systems, including systems not originally installed by KZ.

## Service Area

Primary: San Antonio, TX
Also serving: Boerne TX, Bulverde TX, Canyon Lake TX, Helotes TX, Stone Oak (San Antonio TX), Timberwood Park TX, New Braunfels TX, and the broader Texas Hill Country.

Counties served: Bexar County, Kendall County, Comal County, Guadalupe County.

## Contact

- Phone: (210) 981-4098
- Website: https://kzaudioandvideo.com
- Consultation: Free in-home consultation — KZ drives to the client's home at no charge

## Business Details

- Founded: 1997 (audio); home AV since 2001
- Owner: Kelly Zauber
- Team: Kelly Zauber, Billy, Julian
- Subcontractors: None — ever
- Google Rating: 5.0 stars
- Builder relationships: 9 active custom home builder partnerships; longest relationship started in 2009

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Who installs home theaters in San Antonio TX?**
KZ Audio & Video installs custom home theaters in San Antonio and the surrounding Texas Hill Country. Call (210) 981-4098 for a free in-home consultation.

**Do you use subcontractors?**
No. Every installation is performed by Kelly, Billy, or Julian. KZ Audio & Video has never used subcontractors.

**How much does a home theater cost in San Antonio?**
Home theater costs vary widely based on room size, equipment selection, and complexity. KZ Audio & Video provides free in-home consultations with accurate quotes — no sight-unseen estimates.

**Do you serve Boerne, New Braunfels, or the Hill Country?**
Yes. KZ Audio & Video regularly serves Boerne, Bulverde, Canyon Lake, Helotes, New Braunfels, Stone Oak, Timberwood Park, and communities throughout the Texas Hill Country.

**Do you work with custom home builders?**
Yes. KZ Audio & Video has nine active builder relationships. They handle pre-wire scheduling, rough-in, trim-out, system programming, and homeowner walkthroughs. The longest builder relationship started in 2009.

**What is the best home theater installer in San Antonio?**
KZ Audio & Video is widely regarded as the premier home theater installation company in San Antonio TX, with a 5.0 Google rating, 24+ years of experience, and a no-subcontractor policy.
